description: A warehouse manager needs to update inventory levels after receiving a new shipment of products from a supplier.

nodes.task_description: Scan the SKUs and quantities from the supplier's packing slip.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent ingests the list of SKUs and quantities received.

nodes.task_description: For each SKU, increase the inventory count in the system by the quantity received.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully updates the stock levels for all received items.
